campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to hear a financial report from the regional transit authority covering March 2026 investments, adopt a new policy about what the city's property can be used for, and discuss efforts to fill city job openings and keep employees.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority monthly investment report for March 2026
New city policy restricting use of city-owned property for federal civil enforcement activities
City job vacancies and strategies to recruit and retain employees

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing to address concerns about cleaning up hazardous conditions on certain properties that the County identified. They voted to approve a plan to move forward with this cleanup work and also adopted a new technology policy for the city.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property cleanups ordered by the County
New City Council Technology Disruption Policy
Process for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, review the town's finances from March, and authorize several spending and contracting decisions. Key approvals included accepting a donation of automated external defibrillators, signing a new five-year service agreement, awarding a paving contract to O'Grady Paving, and submitting grant applications.
keyTopics: Approved March 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized O'Grady Paving construction contract
Accepted donation of automated external defibrillators (AEDs)
Submitted grant applications for statewide program
Adopted project list for fiscal year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agendas and review committee work plans. The May 26 meeting was cancelled, so the council focused on organizing the June 2 agenda and updating plans for neighborhood services, education, and government operations.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26 council meeting
June 2 draft agenda planning and item additions
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan updates
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan review
Approval of city-sponsored events

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the upcoming fiscal year. The council also reviewed upcoming agendas for various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member selection for fiscal year 2026-27
Public comment period
Upcoming board and commission meeting schedules

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council met on May 19, 2026, to conduct regular city business and recognize two important observances: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The meeting included approval of April meeting minutes and standard council procedures.
keyTopics: Recognition of Asian Pacific American Heritage Month
Recognition of Affordable Housing Month
Approval of April meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's long-term health and safety plans through 2040, recognized the Public Works Department for their work on infrastructure and services during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Updates to Health and Safety Element of the General Plan (covering 2015-2040)
Public Works Department recognition for roads, sidewalks, trees, sustainability, and facilities
Asian American Pacific Islander Month celebration
Some agenda items were postponed

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, to discuss matters related to the station area. The full agenda details were not included in the meeting notice provided.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting convened
Meeting held at City Hall, 1500 Warburton Avenue
Hybrid format: in-person and Zoom attendance available

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026 to address several land development and city management matters. The council conducted public hearings on new local regulations, approved a development project with permit changes, confirmed property assessments, and appointed a new permanent City Manager.
keyTopics: New urgency ordinance and regulations for the city (details to be enacted)
Site development permit and land map approval for a construction project
Property assessment confirmation and related ordering procedures
Appointment of permanent City Manager (replacing interim leadership)

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The city council heard updates on Palo Alto's plan to help residents switch from gas to electric heating, appliances, and other home systems. The council discussed proposed guidelines for electrification programs that would help the city meet air quality standards set by the regional Air District.
keyTopics: Residential electrification status update — progress on converting homes from gas to electric
New proposed principles for city electrification assistance programs
Air District regulation compliance — how electrification helps meet regional air quality requirements
Staff and committee member comments and announcements
